reasoning_content:
Task 5 requires RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc which needs llvm-tblgen to generate. But `llvm-tblgen` doesn't seem to be installed. Let me check if it's available or if I need to install it.

Let me also check what the build system expects.

action.command: which llvm-tblgen || apt-get install -y llvm-18 llvm-18-dev 2>&1 | tail -5; find / -name "llvm-tblgen*" 2>/dev/null | head -5; find / -name "RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc" 2>/dev/null | head -5

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "which llvm-tblgen || apt-get install -y llvm-18 llvm-18-dev 2>&1 | tail -5; find / -name \"llvm-tblgen*\" 2>/dev/null | head -5; find / -name \"RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc\" 2>/dev/null | head -5", "summary": "Check llvm-tblgen availability", "timeout": 30}
